name: Marvel Spider-Man Mask Knit Kids' Throw Blanket - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: This Marvel Spider-Man Mask Knit Kids' Throw Blanket from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™ makes a great gift for your young Avenger. Made from recycled polyester-blend knit fabric for soft comfort, this throw blanket features a large graphic of Spider-Man's face mask on a blue backdrop for a fan-favorite look. Great for tossing on their bed or armchair with other Marvel-themed blankets and pillows, it'll help them stay warm and cozy as they read a book or get ready for bed.
